en_title: 10 Fantasy Audiobooks That Will Magically Transport You to Another World
cn_title: 10部奇幻有声书推荐 带你穿越到另一个世界
opus_summary: IGN精选10部顶级奇幻有声书，涵盖托尔金《指环王》（Andy Serkis配音）、《哈利·波特》全卡司版、布兰登·桑德森《迷雾之子》、LitRPG经典《地下城爬行者卡尔》、Joe Abercrombie残酷奇幻三部曲、网络长篇《The Wandering Inn》、马丁《冰与火之歌》、罗伯特·乔丹《时光之轮》、鲍里尼《龙骑士》和莎拉·J·马斯浪漫奇幻《Throne of Glass》。文章强调这些作品的有声版通过出色的旁白表演（如Michael Kramer、Jeff Hays、Steve Pacey等）显著提升了阅读体验，部分甚至超越纸质版想象力。适合通勤或碎片时间沉浸于异世界冒险。

paragraphs.en: There are a lot of amazing fantasy books out there, but not all of them have a really good audiobook version. Some stories are just flat out better with narrated audio attached, but a lot of the time I find myself preferring to just read the words myself. It's pretty rare for audio or a narrator to elevate a book beyond my own imagination, so I've gathered together some of the best fantasy audiobooks that have done just that to help guide you toward an amazing listening experience.
paragraphs.cn: 市面上优秀的奇幻书籍数不胜数，但并非所有作品都有真正出色的有声书版本。有些故事配上朗读音频后确实更出彩，但大多数时候我还是更喜欢自己读文字。音频或旁白能将一本书提升到超越我自身想象力的程度，这种情况相当罕见——所以我汇集了一些做到这一点的最佳奇幻有声书,帮你找到绝佳的聆听体验。

paragraphs.en: 1. The Lord of the Rings
paragraphs.cn: 1. 《指环王》

paragraphs.en: It makes sense to start any fantasy book list with The Lord of the Rings. J.R.R. Tolkien is arguably the most influential fantasy author that ever lived and his books have helped shape the entire genre into what it is today. The Lord of the Rings books have already been immortalized in film thanks to Peter Jackson, but if you find yourself wanting to dive into the original story, I highly recommend checking out the audiobooks. The narrator for these books is actually Andy Serkis himself, who you may know as the guy who plays Gollum. He does an excellent job of doing all of the character voices without directly copying the movies.
paragraphs.cn: 任何奇幻书单以《指环王》开场都说得通。J.R.R.托尔金可以说是有史以来影响力最大的奇幻作家,他的作品塑造了整个类型的今日面貌。《指环王》已被彼得·杰克逊搬上银幕永载史册,但如果你想深入原著故事,我强烈推荐有声书版本。旁白正是Andy Serkis本人——你可能知道他就是饰演咕噜的那位。他出色地演绎了所有角色的声音,且没有直接照搬电影。

paragraphs.en: 2. Harry Potter Full-Cast Audiobooks
paragraphs.cn: 2. 《哈利·波特》全卡司有声书

paragraphs.en: If you're a fan of fantasy novels, there's a good chance you've already read the Harry Potter books and watched the movies. You may have even listened to the Harry Potter audiobooks, but if you haven't tried the full-cast versions, you're in for a treat. In addition to a pretty stacked voice cast, there's a ton of little details that go into background sounds and sound effects that really bring the story to life in a way the books couldn't quite do. As of May, all seven books are available with the full-cast audio treatment exclusively on Audible.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你是奇幻小说爱好者,很可能已经读过《哈利·波特》系列并看过电影。你甚至可能听过有声书,但如果还没试过全卡司版本,那你有福了。除了阵容强大的配音演员,背景音效和细节处理真正以纸质书无法做到的方式让故事鲜活起来。截至5月,全部七本书的全卡司版已在Audible独家上线。

paragraphs.en: 3. Mistborn
paragraphs.cn: 3. 《迷雾之子》

paragraphs.en: Brandon Sanderson's Mistborn series is one of my all-time favorite fantasy books and I am very excited that the first trilogy is being adapted into a TV series. Mistborn is a great entry point into the larger Cosmere universe and both the book and audiobook are excellent. The audiobooks are narrated by Michael Kramer, who is well known in the industry for his incredible range and pacing.
paragraphs.cn: 布兰登·桑德森的《迷雾之子》系列是我最爱的奇幻作品之一,首部三部曲正在被改编为电视剧,我对此非常期待。《迷雾之子》是进入更广阔寰宇(Cosmere)的绝佳入口,书籍和有声书版本都非常出色。有声书由Michael Kramer朗读,他以惊人的音域和节奏感在业内享有盛名。

paragraphs.en: 4. Dungeon Crawler Carl
paragraphs.cn: 4. 《地下城爬行者卡尔》

paragraphs.en: The Dungeon Crawler Carl series is one of my favorite LitRPG reads of all time, but the audiobooks are even better. Thanks to excellent narration from Jeff Hays and a story that absolutely lends itself to the audio format, Dungeon Crawler Carl is one of the most popular audiobooks available for any genre. There are now eight total books in the series with Parade of Horribles released earlier in May. The story itself is a mix of sci-fi, fantasy, and intergalactic gameshow that you won't really understand until you dive in.
paragraphs.cn: 《地下城爬行者卡尔》系列是我最爱的LitRPG作品之一,但有声书版本更胜一筹。得益于Jeff Hays的出色朗读以及故事本身极其适合音频形式,《地下城爬行者卡尔》已成为所有类型中最受欢迎的有声书之一。该系列现有8本书,5月刚发布了《恐怖游行》。故事本身是科幻、奇幻与星际游戏秀的混合体,不亲身体验很难理解。

paragraphs.en: 5. First Law Trilogy
paragraphs.cn: 5. First Law三部曲

paragraphs.en: Before doing a bit of research I had never actually heard of Joe Abercrombie's First Law Trilogy, but many folks in the fantasy book community have called it one of the best audiobook performances around. It's a gritty fantasy that deconstructs classic archetypes in interesting new ways. The books are narrated by Steve Pacey, who is regarded as one of the best narrators in the industry thanks to a solid range of character voices that elevate the source material.
paragraphs.cn: 在做功课之前我从未听说过Joe Abercrombie的First Law三部曲,但奇幻书圈的许多人都称其为最佳有声书演绎之一。这是一部以有趣新方式解构经典原型的残酷奇幻作品。旁白是Steve Pacey,凭借扎实的角色音域和提升原著的能力,他被视为业内最顶尖的旁白之一。

paragraphs.en: 6. The Wandering Inn
paragraphs.cn: 6. The Wandering Inn

paragraphs.en: The Wandering Inn is another great LitRPG story set in a fantasy world. Although it started as a web serial, it has continued to expand into the publishing space. It's one the largest fantasy book series available with 21 books and counting. As for the audiobooks, Andrea Parsneau does a terrific job voicing all of the characters and side stories the books take. It's also an incredible use of Audible credits with the first audiobook offering more than 48 hours of content for a single credit.
paragraphs.cn: 《The Wandering Inn》是另一部出色的LitRPG奇幻作品。虽然始于网络连载,但已持续扩展至出版领域。这是现有最庞大的奇幻系列之一,已有21本书且仍在增长。有声书方面,Andrea Parsneau出色地演绎了所有角色和支线故事。用Audible点数购买也超值——第一本有声书单点数就提供超过48小时内容。

paragraphs.en: 7. A Game of Thrones
paragraphs.cn: 7. 《权力的游戏》

paragraphs.en: George R.R. Martin's A Song of Ice and Fire series continues to be one of the most popular stories available right now. Not only did it spawn the Game of Thrones TV series, it has also launched a series of spin-offs that have been very well received. If you loved the show (excluding the last season), I highly recommend you check out the source material. The narration is done by Roy Dotrice, who did an excellent job at elevating Martin's words for audio.
paragraphs.cn: 乔治·R·R·马丁的《冰与火之歌》系列依然是当下最受欢迎的故事之一。它不仅催生了《权力的游戏》电视剧,还推出了一系列广受好评的衍生作品。如果你喜欢那部剧(最后一季除外),我强烈建议查阅原著。旁白是Roy Dotrice,他出色地将马丁的文字提升到了音频高度。

paragraphs.en: 8. The Wheel of Time
paragraphs.cn: 8. 《时光之轮》

paragraphs.en: Robert Jordan's Wheel of Time series is one of the most iconic stories in fantasy and the audiobooks are one of the best ways to enjoy the story. What makes these books so good is just how developed Jordan's characters and world becomes as the story progresses. Considering the final books in the series were actually written in part by Brandon Sanderson after Robert Jordan's passing, it's unsurprising that Michael Kramer is also one of the narrators for this story. He does a great job alongside Kate Reading to bring the story to life.
paragraphs.cn: 罗伯特·乔丹的《时光之轮》系列是奇幻领域最具标志性的故事之一,有声书是享受这个故事的最佳方式之一。这些书的出色之处在于随着故事推进,乔丹笔下的角色和世界变得何等丰满。考虑到系列最后几本书在乔丹去世后部分由布兰登·桑德森完成,Michael Kramer也是本作旁白之一就不足为奇了。他与Kate Reading携手将故事演绎得活灵活现。

paragraphs.en: 9. Eragon
paragraphs.cn: 9. 《龙骑士》

paragraphs.en: Eragon was one of the first books I read that really drew me into the fantasy genre. Christopher Paolini's dragon fantasy is a coming-of-age story that falls somewhere between Lord of the Rings and Harry Potter in all of the right ways. While I have all of the books in the Inheritance Cycle multiple times now, I've never actually listened to the audio versions. Based on what I was able to uncover after browsing reviews and the audiobook community, Gerard Doyle's performance is pretty widely praised.
paragraphs.cn: 《龙骑士》(Eragon)是最早真正将我引入奇幻类型的作品之一。克里斯托弗·鲍里尼的龙骑奇幻是一个成长故事,在各个正确的维度上介于《指环王》与《哈利·波特》之间。虽然我已多次拥有《遗产四部曲》的所有书籍,但从未真正听过音频版本。根据我浏览评论和有声书社区后的发现,Gerard Doyle的演绎广受赞誉。

paragraphs.en: 10. Throne of Glass
paragraphs.cn: 10. Throne of Glass

paragraphs.en: Fantasy includes a pretty wide range of subgenres, but arguably one of the hottest ones right now is romantasy. I personally love romantasy books, but these types of stories are a mix of magic and sexual situations that not every reader is going to be up for. If you are interested in romantasy, however, I highly recommend checking out the audiobooks for Sarah J. Maas' Throne of Glass series. Following Celaena's tale from slavery to champion and beyond is only made better by excellent narration from Elizabeth Evans.
paragraphs.cn: 奇幻涵盖相当广泛的子类型,但目前最火的可能是浪漫奇幻(romantasy)。我个人很喜欢romantasy,但这类故事混合了魔法与情色场景,并非每位读者都能接受。不过如果你对romantasy感兴趣,我强烈推荐莎拉·J·马斯《Throne of Glass》系列的有声书。追随Celaena从奴隶到冠军乃至更远的故事,在Elizabeth Evans出色的朗读下更添魅力。

paragraphs.en: Jacob Kienlen is a Senior Audience Development Strategist and Writer for IGN.
paragraphs.cn: Jacob Kienlen是IGN的高级受众发展策略师与撰稿人。
